channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: The VR exhibit at the National Museum of Nature and Science, Tokyo, “The Creation of Electronic Musical Instruments,” has become a permanent exhibit, allowing visitors to experience it using smartphones or VR headsets. - Mogura VR
